# Quality Metrics and Validation Pass Rates Documentation

| Total Checks Executed | 247 |
| Total Passed | 218 |
| Total Failed | 29 |
| Overall Pass Rate | 88.3% |
| Execution Date | 2024-01-15 |
| Study ID | XYZ-123 |
| Analysis Dataset | ADSL, ADAE, ADLB |

## 6. Recommendations

1. **Critical Issues**: Address all 4 critical failures before proceeding with next validation cycle
2. **Process Improvement**: Implement automated checks for D-004 (date consistency) and P-002 (derivation logic)
3. **Documentation**: Update programming standards documentation to address P-005 findings
4. **Training**: Schedule refresher training on M-002 (imputation rules) for programming team
5. **Re-validation**: Plan full re-validation after all critical and major issues are resolved
